title: The Daddy Long Legs Rides Again
description: Starting where Banjo Groyne meets Madeira Drive next to The Volk's railway shed, everyone will experience The Pioneer train (The Daddy Long Legs) using their phones with an innovative smartphone app created by artist Luciana Haill. The historical facts and cultural connections are presented in a talk that becomes a guided walk for 1.3 miles as we follow part of the route this train made between 1896 and 1901. At the end, we will all have an interior tour inside the opulent carriage and upper deck of The Daddy Long Legs, stopping for souvenir photos. This is fully accessible using pavements and paths at beach level and ending close to the car wash near ASDA in Brighton Marina. Please download the app in advance, as signal can be patchy on the beach! The app is called Pioneer_AR and can be found here: https://sites.google.com/view/daddy-long-legs-train
